title: Sorengia stenodes
taxonomy: Sorengia stenodes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Sorengia, which is a monotypic genus consisting of only one species. The plant's classification is part of the family Poaceae and the order Poales. Sorengia stenodes is native to South America, specifically in the mountainous regions of Chile and Argentina. As a member of the grass family, Sorengia stenodes shares characteristics with other grasses such as its photosynthetic leaves and seed-producing flowers.
